title: Korg SP170S Digital Piano -- A Student's Perspective
body: Is this good to learn how to play the piano?  I have a small apartment.  I also like that you can wear headphones.
author: @adelgado75

title: Korg SP170S Digital Piano -- A Student's Perspective
body: Hi just bough this korg piano and iam loving it. Started to use simply piano what cable can i use to connect my ipad to this korg? I only see one midi ouput. The ipad sometimes is having difficulty in picking up the notes from the keyboard any ideas how to solve the issue? Thank u and more power to this channel
author: @Mxttyy

title: Korg SP170S Digital Piano -- A Student's Perspective
body: How would you say the NH keys feel against the Korg B1?  Is the SP170s superior in replicating a grand piano key than the B1?  Thank you.
author: @jonvine6800
